collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (7 total Queries, 7 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `brw_code`, `tool_code`, `tool_name`, DATE_FORMAT(`time_from`, '%h:%i %p') AS time_from, DATE_FORMAT(`time_to`, '%h:%i %p') AS time_to, DATE_FORMAT(`borrowed_at`, '%b %d, %Y') AS borrowed_at, DATE_FORMAT( CONCAT(`due_date`, ' ', COALESCE(`time_to`, '23:59:59')), '%b %d, %Y %h:%i %p' ) AS due_date, CASE `status` WHEN 1 THEN 'Active' WHEN 2 THEN 'Returned' WHEN 3 THEN 'Overdue' END AS status FROM `borrowings` WHERE `user_code` = 'STU-00001' ORDER BY `created_at` DESC LIMIT 5

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `brw_code`, `tool_code`, `tool_name`, DATE_FORMAT(`time_from`, '%h:%i %p') AS time_from, DATE_FORMAT(`time_to`, '%h:%i %p') AS time_to, DATE_FORMAT(`borrowed_at`, '%b %d, %Y') AS borrowed_at, DATE_FORMAT( CONCAT(`due_date`, ' ', COALESCE(`time_to`, '23:59:59')), '%b %d, %Y %h:%i %p' ) AS due_date, CASE `status` WHEN 1 THEN 'Active' WHEN 2 THEN 'Returned' WHEN 3 THEN 'Overdue' END AS status FROM `borrowings` WHERE `user_code` = 'STU-00001' ORDER BY `created_at` DESC LIMIT 5
